sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 7% indicates strong operational performance and positive momentum.

sentiment.reasoning: Lowering full-year guidance due to softening demand is a clear negative signal for future financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
